title: 有馬記念の後に・未来のために

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky does well at the Arima Kinen, but at the
same time realizes Grass Wonder is a much bigger
threat than she had anticipated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She decides to run in the next race, the spring
Tenno Sho, to retest her abilities. The incredible
Special Week will also be running there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nearby, King Halo decides to walk her own path
and proudly leaves the racecourse.
